nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-throated green warbler
nodes.summary: Black-throated green warbler（Black-throated green warbler，学名 Setophaga virens），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The breeding habitat of the black-throated green warbler is coniferous and mixed forests in eastern North America and western Canada and cypress swamps on the southern Atlantic coast, with preference for dense stands of conifers.{{Cite journal |last1=Robichaud |first1=Isabelle |last2=Villard |first2=Marc-Andre |date=1999 |title=Do black-throated green warblers prefer conifers?
